# QA Testing Template

```markdown
## Overview
> Brief description of what is being tested and why

## Related Feature/Epic
> Link to the feature or epic being tested (#Issue number)

## Testing Environment
> Specify where testing should occur
- [ ] Staging
- [ ] Production (post-deployment verification)

## Prerequisites
> Any setup, data, or access requirements needed before testing
- Account requirements (e.g., specific license tier, permissions)
- Test data needed
- Feature flags that must be enabled
- Other configuration requirements

## Test Scenarios

### Scenario 1: [Descriptive Name]
**URL:** `[Exact URL where testing begins]`

1. [Action to take]
   - **Expect:** [Expected outcome or behavior]

2. [Next action to take]
   - **Expect:** [Expected outcome or behavior]

---

### Scenario 2: [Descriptive Name]
**URL:** `[Exact URL where testing begins]`

1. [Action to take]
   - **Expect:** [Expected outcome or behavior]

## Known Limitations
> Any expected behaviors that might seem like bugs but are intentional
- Limitation 1: [Description]
```
